diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Cerebral infarction associated with FV Leiden mutation and protein C deficiency
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The final diagnosis was based on the presence of prothrombotic risk factors, specifically FV Leiden mutation and protein C deficiency, in children with cerebral infarction. The study compared these findings with a healthy pediatric control group and found a statistically significant association between these thrombophilic disorders and cerebral infarction in children.
